No Poverty.reason: The course syllabus contains no explicit or implicit evidence related to poverty eradication or any of its targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: The course syllabus contains no explicit or implicit evidence related to hunger, food security, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course, focused on psychology research and professional competence, inherently contributes to promoting mental health and well-being, aligning with Target 3.4.

Quality Education.reason: As a doctoral-level course, it provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and cultivates professional research skills and competitiveness, directly supporting relevant skills for employment (Target 4.4).

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course syllabus contains no explicit or implicit evidence related to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course aims to cultivate professional knowledge and competitiveness for future psychology-related careers, directly supporting productive employment (Target 8.5).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course syllabus contains no explicit or implicit evidence related to peace, justice, or institutional strength.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course syllabus contains no explicit or implicit evidence related to global partnerships or means of implementation for the SDGs.
